name: D2R Loot Filter — Intense
description: A D2R Lord of Destruction loot-filter overlay. Hides trash drops and 323 aggressively filtered equipment bases including high-volume normal/exceptional weapons, armor and class items; can mark superior bases in red; converts inherited black labels to dots; crunches gem names; compacts Gold pile labels; and can mute the Slain Monsters Rest in Peace corpse chime without removing its animation. Reign of the Warlock content is intentionally excluded. Drops and mechanics are unchanged.
author: voc0der

children.name: 100% Rejuv Only
children.description: Hide every potion that is not a Full Rejuvenation Potion: small rejuvs, all healing potions, all mana potions, and thawing/antidote/stamina potions.

children.name: Hide Large Charms
children.description: Hide the Large Charm base label. WARNING: this also hides an unidentified Hellfire Torch drop because it shares the same cm2 base string. Once identified, the Torch's separate name remains visible.

children.name: Hide Throwing Potions
children.description: Hide all gas and oil throwing potions.

children.name: Hide Unpopular Bases
children.description: Aggressively hide 323 high-volume LoD endgame bases: most normal/exceptional generic weapons, common low-tier armor, weak shields, lower Paladin shields, selected weak elite alternatives, and normal/exceptional class items (Amazon weapons, claws, Barbarian helms, Druid pelts, Necromancer heads, Sorceress orbs, scepters, wands, staves) below their audited keeps. Important utility, mercenary, Tal Rasha, rare-set, and runeword bases stay visible. ENDGAME WARNING: hides ALL rarities and qualities, including documented unique/set/staffmod collisions.

children.name: Red Superior Items
children.description: Replace the shared Superior/Sup word with an inline red color, so useful superior bases display as a red base name with no quality word. Socketed and ethereal superior bases are red too. Hidden bases keep the selected dot color because their later inline dot color wins.

children.name: Black Labels to Dots
children.description: Replace direct labels whose final active inline color is D2's #000/black code (ÿc6) with the selected dot. Inferior-quality prefixes become a dot but their separately appended base name remains black unless Hide Unpopular Bases also hides that base. Keep this mod later in load order.

children.name: Gem Crunch
children.description: Rename every gem to a compact colored tier label: 1 = Chipped, 2 = Flawed, 3 = regular, 4 = Flawless, P = Perfect (for example, 1Topaz and PTopaz). Recognizes standard gem-type colors in multi-color labels from an earlier filter; otherwise preserves its first inline color. See the README for the shared-affix caveat.

children.name: Mute Rest in Peace Sound
children.description: Silence the repeated corpse chime from Slain Monsters Rest in Peace while keeping its red soul animation and corpse-blocking effect. Applies to Nature's Peace, Tyrael's Might, Lawbringer, and any other source of the modifier. Does not mute the Paladin's Redemption skill.

children.name: Hidden Item Style
children.description: Hidden items are renamed to a tiny colored dot instead of an empty string, because an empty name renders as an ugly empty highlight box.

children.name: Compact Gold Label
children.description: Replace the word Gold after a ground-pile amount with $, neutral G, or no suffix. D2R builds this as a suffix, so the results are 1234 $, 1234 G, or 1234.
